com.lumorix.dropdash.description: A compact offline arcade release for validating Lumorix Launcher install, launch, uninstall, and future update flows.

1.0.0: Adds a playable dodge-and-collect arcade loop with restart and local high score.
Uses a synthetic offline package for reliable install, launch, repair, and uninstall testing.

com.lumorix.signal-lab.description: A compact local utility sandbox for validating Lumorix tool distribution, lightweight build flows, and collection behavior.

0.9.2: Introduces a lightweight local utility package for Shop and Library workflows.

com.lumorix.project-atlas.description: A Lumorix project prototype focused on open-world survival systems inside the same launcher shell.

0.4.0: Introduces a project package centered on exploration, crafting, and worldbuilding.
